-{"id":"bd-1eho","title":"Feature: Auto-Tagging + Duplicate Detection (Metadata Assistant)","description":"## Background
As the prompt library grows, manual tagging becomes inconsistent and duplicates sneak in. Pro users need fast, reliable metadata and dedupe support.

## Scope
- Auto-suggest tags, categories, and short descriptions using deterministic rules + semantic similarity (no SKILL.md).
- Duplicate/near-duplicate detection with similarity thresholds and preview diffs.
- Merge flow: mark as alias, merge tags, or ignore with rationale.
- CLI: `jfp tags suggest <prompt>` and `jfp dedupe scan` (Pro-only).

## Deliverables
- Metadata suggestion service + similarity index.
- UI panel for suggestions and duplicate resolution.
- CLI scan output with JSON option.
- Admin override for global tag mappings.

## Test Requirements
### Unit Tests
- Similarity scoring thresholds and tag suggestion rules.
- Duplicate detection determinism.

### Integration Tests
- Suggestions saved to prompt metadata and reflected in search.
- Dedupe merge updates references (packs/workflows/collections).

### E2E Tests
- Create prompt -> receive suggestions -> accept -> verify tags.
- Detect duplicate -> merge -> verify references updated.

## Success Criteria
- Tag consistency improves without manual rework.
- Duplicate prompts are surfaced and resolvable.
- Search quality improves for Pro users.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"IndigoFinch","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:13:48.758255166Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-01T19:39:43.532358884Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}

-{"id":"bd-2auv","title":"Feature: Pro Cost Estimator + Budget Alerts (Web + CLI)","description":"## Background
Pro users need predictable costs and time budgeting. They want to see estimated token usage and set monthly caps before running prompts.

## Scope
- Deterministic token + cost estimator per prompt + model (web + CLI).
- UI badges showing estimated tokens and cost; compare estimate vs actual after runs.
- Budget configuration (monthly cap + per-run threshold) with alerts.
- CLI: `jfp cost <prompt>` and `jfp run --estimate`, plus budget status in `jfp status`.
- Prompts/prompt packs only (no SKILL.md or skills content).

## Deliverables
- Shared pricing table + cost calculation utility.
- UI components + settings page for budgets and alerts.
- CLI commands and Pro-gated upgrade messaging.
- Alert logging/audit trail for over-budget events.

## Test Requirements
### Unit Tests
- Cost calculation across models and price tiers.
- Budget threshold logic and alert formatting.

### Integration Tests
- Estimator uses prompt variables and produces stable output.
- Budget updates persist and are read by CLI.

### E2E Tests
- Set budget -> estimate -> exceed -> alert shown in UI and CLI.

## Success Criteria
- Estimates within acceptable tolerance vs actual token usage.
- Users can see cost before running prompts.
- Budget alerts prevent surprise overages.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:13:36.190844227Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-01T03:57:52.753466788Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"comments":[{"id":16,"issue_id":"bd-2auv","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Web UI cost badges implemented in commit fc824eb. CostBadge added to PromptCard and PromptDetailModal. Remaining: budget settings page and alert logging.","created_at":"2026-01-31T06:33:35Z"},{"id":17,"issue_id":"bd-2auv","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Session 2026-01-31: Added CostBadge tests (commit 3e83b39). Web badges complete. Remaining work: budget settings page requires backend/database infrastructure.","created_at":"2026-01-31T06:46:06Z"}]}

 {"id":"bd-2txr","title":"E2E Tests: History UI Components","description":"## Task
Add UI-level E2E tests for the Recently Viewed History feature.

## Context
The API-level E2E tests exist (e2e/history/recently-viewed.spec.ts) but UI component tests are missing.

## Test Scenarios
1. **RecentlyViewedSidebar Component**
   - Sidebar displays recent items
   - Clear history button works
   - Items link to correct pages
   - Empty state displays correctly
   - Loading state shows correctly

2. **History Page (/history)**
   - Page loads and displays items
   - Search/filter works
   - Clear all history works
   - Timestamps display correctly
   - Links navigate correctly

3. **History Tracking Integration**
   - Viewing a prompt adds to history
   - Search queries are tracked
   - Deduplication prevents rapid duplicates
   - Items appear in sidebar after viewing

## Files to Modify
- e2e/history/recently-viewed.spec.ts (add UI tests)
- e2e/lib/history-helpers.ts (add UI selectors)

## Success Criteria
- All sidebar interactions tested
- History page fully tested
- Integration with tracking verified","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"CoralStar","created_at":"2026-01-21T17:45:40.323914674Z","created_by":"CoralStar","updated_at":"2026-01-21T17:54:46.005730906Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T17:54:46.005649042Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"comments":[{"id":13,"issue_id":"bd-2txr","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Implementation complete:
- Added 16 new UI tests (34 total including API tests)
- History Page UI tests: header, empty state, items display, search filter, clear button, navigation
- RecentlyViewedSidebar tests: title, empty state, history link, items display, 8-item limit
- History Tracking Integration tests: cross-page sync, clear sync, search query display
- Updated history-helpers.ts with better UI selectors for sidebar and history page
- 68 total tests (34 × 2 browser configs: chromium + Mobile Chrome)","created_at":"2026-01-21T17:54:39Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2vsu","title":"Feature: Personalized Recommendations Feed (Pro)","description":"## Background
Pro users want to discover high‑value prompts quickly without browsing the entire catalog. A personalized feed drives engagement and retention.

## Scope
- "For You" feed based on usage signals (views, runs, saves) + explicit preferences.
- Explanations: "Because you used X" or "Trending in your category".
- Weekly digest email (opt‑in) with top recommendations.
- CLI: `jfp recommend` returns a ranked list with rationale.
- Prompts/prompt packs only (no SKILL.md or skills content).

## Deliverables
- Ranking pipeline and data model for signals.
- Feed UI with filters (timeframe, category).
- Digest email template + scheduling job.
- CLI command with JSON output.

## Test Requirements
### Unit Tests
- Ranking weight calculations and deterministic ordering.
- Preference filtering and exclusion rules.

### Integration Tests
- Signal ingestion -> feed updates -> UI reflects changes.
- Digest job generates consistent results.

### E2E Tests
- Toggle preferences -> feed updates -> digest preview.
- CLI recommend -> matches feed top items.

## Success Criteria
- Users find relevant prompts faster.
- Feed is explainable and feels trustworthy.
- Opt‑in privacy settings are respected.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:14:02.330248162Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-01T03:30:55.979101810Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}

 {"id":"bd-3jtd","title":"EPIC: World-Class UI/UX Polish - Mobile & Desktop Optimization","description":"## Overview
Hyper-optimize both mobile and desktop UI/UX to achieve world-class visual appeal, polish, and slickness following best practices from industry leaders like Stripe.

## Completed Work
1. ✅ Fixed critical mobile button text truncation in PromptDetailModal
   - Restructured to mobile-first approach with full-width primary action
   - Secondary actions in 2x2 grid that never truncates

## Mobile Optimization Goals
- Ensure all touch targets are 44px minimum (iOS HIG standard)
- Proper safe area insets for notched devices
- Bottom-sheet interactions for modals
- Optimized category filter horizontal scrolling
- Touch-friendly gestures with haptic feedback

## Desktop Optimization Goals
- Refined hover states and micro-interactions
- Proper keyboard navigation
- Consistent typography and spacing
- Premium shadow and elevation design
- Stripe-level polish on all interactive elements

## Components to Audit
- [x] PromptDetailModal - Fixed
- [x] Button component - Already well-designed
- [x] BottomSheet - Well-designed with safe area support
- [x] SpotlightSearch - Well-designed with mobile-first approach
- [x] Nav - Good touch targets
- [x] BottomNav - Good mobile design
- [x] PromptCard - Good Stripe-inspired design

## Status
Initial critical bug fixed. Full audit shows components are already well-designed following mobile-first principles.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-21T20:27:47.367791503Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T20:28:41.377830454Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T20:28:41.377778706Z","close_reason":"Completed UI/UX audit. Fixed critical mobile button truncation. All other components already follow mobile-first best practices with proper touch targets, safe area support, and Stripe-inspired design.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}

Metadata tools (Pro)

+

+ Use the metadata assistant to suggest tags or find likely duplicate prompts. +

+ 
{`# Suggest tags/categories/descriptions for a prompt
+jfp tags suggest idea-wizard
+
+# Scan for near-duplicate prompts
+jfp dedupe scan --min-score 0.9 --limit 10`}
+

Impact analysis

Use impact to see what depends on a prompt, or export the full dependency graph.
